author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #13 is confirmed! Join us this Wednesday at 1900 UTC! 

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel  

This week's main topic: Mid Risk Zone What is going to be the economic role of the medium-risk zone? The medium-risk zone as the gate keeper of the high-risk zone, what's happening at the borders? Native Careers of the medium-Risk zone, what can one expect?
 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/973600812280459304
